metadata.description: Claude for Healthcare — one plugin bundling payer, provider, pharma, and general healthcare skills over hosted MCP servers

plugins.name: healthcare
plugins.description: Prior auth, ICD-10-CM medical coding, clinical trial protocols, FHIR development — with CMS Coverage, ICD-10, NPI Registry, Clinical Trials, and PubMed connected

plugins.name: clinical-trial-protocol
plugins.description: Deprecated — install healthcare@healthcare instead. Generate FDA/NIH-compliant clinical trial protocols for medical devices or drugs

plugins.name: prior-auth-review
plugins.description: Deprecated — install healthcare@healthcare instead. Automate payer review of prior authorization requests with clinical documentation synthesis

plugins.name: fhir-developer
plugins.description: Deprecated — install healthcare@healthcare instead. FHIR API development guide for building healthcare endpoints with R4 resources and SMART authorization

plugins.name: cms-coverage
plugins.description: Deprecated — install healthcare@healthcare instead. Access the CMS Coverage Database

plugins.name: npi-registry
plugins.description: Deprecated — install healthcare@healthcare instead. Access US National Provider Identifier (NPI) Registry

plugins.name: pubmed
plugins.description: Deprecated — install healthcare@healthcare instead. Search biomedical literature from PubMed

plugins.name: icd10-codes
plugins.description: Deprecated — install healthcare@healthcare instead. Access ICD-10-CM and ICD-10-PCS code sets
